message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle uml2
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam lifelineBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
skinparam lifelineBorderColor #000000
skinparam actorBackgroundColor #E6E6FF
skinparam actorBorderColor #000000
skinparam rectangleBackgroundColor #E6E6E6
skinparam rectangleBorderColor #000000

actor User
participant Server
participant SuperHeroApi

box "Backend Environment" #E6E6E6
  participant Server
  participant SuperHeroApi
end box

alt [user search]
  User -> Server: GET /search?q=<queryValue>
  activate Server
  Server -> Server: getFromCache (queryValue) ?
  note over Server: binarySearch (query)
  alt [has in cache]
    Server --> User: 200: queryValue
  else [not has in cache: request to API]
    Server -> SuperHeroApi: GET queryValue
    activate SuperHeroApi
    SuperHeroApi --> Server: 200: queryValue
    deactivate SuperHeroApi
    Server -> Server: updateCache (queryValue)
    Server --> User: 200: queryValue
  end
  deactivate Server
end

@enduml
